name: Joom Local
title_tag: Manage Your Business Information on Joomlocal with Synup
tags: india; uae; australia; new-zealand; canada; united-kingdom-gb; united-states-us
detailed_paragraph:
Joom Local + Synup

Add, claim, edit business listings & reviews on Joom Local with Synup's listings & review management tools.

What is Joom Local?

Joom Local, a dynamic online marketplace and directory, connects consumers with a wide range of local products and services. Whether you're shopping for unique finds or supporting local businesses, Joom Local offers a convenient platform to explore and engage with your community.

Why Joom Local + Synup?

  • Complete Control Over Listings: With the ability to manage your business listings on Joom Local, you maintain full control over your online presence, ensuring your business is represented accurately.
  • Broaden Your Reach: Adding your business to Joom Local through Synup means increased visibility. Help potential customers discover you, effectively expanding your reach.
  • Accurate Business Information: Enhance trust and credibility by publishing accurate information on Joom Local.
  • Customer Engagement: View and respond back to reviews on Joom Local, fostering a positive relationship with your customers, showing that you value their feedback and are attentive to their needs.

How to integrate Joom Local + Synup?

The Joom Local integration is available to all Synup listings plan subscribers. To view & manage the Joom Local integration:

  1. Visit the Listings tab on Synup's console.
  2. Navigate to the Premium Listings section.
  3. Click on the Joom Local logo to manage the Synup + Joom Local integration and associated settings.

seo.description: Maximize your visibility on Joom Local. Synup integration ensures accurate business data for superior online presence and customer engagement.
